overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game (Cyberpunk 2077), depicting a nighttime exploration of a rain-soaked, neon-lit dystopian city. The player walks through decaying urban streets and elevated walkways, passing holographic advertisements and encountering NPCs, with persistent fog and dramatic teal-purple neon lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: decaying urban street with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in distance

events.description: turns left revealing expansive cyberpunk cityscape with towering neon skyscrapers
emerging from building shadow into area with more ambient neon glow from distant advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dark ruined street, turning to survey the neon-lit cityscape ahead

entered.detail: tall skyscrapers covered in colorful neon advertisements piercing the foggy night sky
tall palm trees lining the left side of the path, silhouetted against the neon glow
decaying concrete structures with broken facades and overgrown vegetation
vertical green laser beam cutting through the fog and haze in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, decaying urban street surrounded by ruined buildings. As the camera turns left, the scene transitions to reveal a breathtaking cyberpunk cityscape with towering neon-lit skyscrapers piercing the foggy night sky. Palm trees line the path, and a distinctive green laser beam cuts through the haze, establishing the dystopian atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking neon-lit city center with warning signage

events.description: large yellow ATTENTION warning sign with triangular symbol comes into view on the left
slight turn to the right while continuing forward along the elevated path

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated pathway, observing the sprawling neon city below and the prominent warning signage

entered.detail: large vertical yellow sign with black triangular warning symbol and ATTENTION text
sweeping overlook of the lower city levels with scattered lights and neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete walkway, the camera reveals a sweeping view of the dystopian city below. A massive yellow ATTENTION warning sign dominates the left side of the frame, while neon advertisements illuminate the foggy air. The path is lined with palm trees, and the camera moves steadily forward with the neon towers shifting to the left as the perspective changes.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown elevated path approaching pedestrian encounter

events.description: two NPCs standing on the pathway come into view ahead
slowing slightly while approaching the two stationary figures on the path

agents.ego_description: approaching two individuals standing on the pathway, preparing to pass them while maintaining awareness

notable_agents.action: two individuals in futuristic clothing standing and conversing on the pathway, facing each other

entered.detail: two human figures standing on the concrete path, one appearing to wear light-colored clothing
derelict cars and debris scattered along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the overgrown elevated path where vegetation has begun reclaiming the concrete. Two NPCs come into view standing ahead on the pathway, creating a moment of tension in the otherwise empty city. The attention warning sign and city overlook fade from view as the camera focuses on navigating past the stationary figures.

scene_state.functional_zone: decayed elevated plaza with burning barrel and amusement park ruins

events.description: passing the two NPCs and continuing forward through the overgrown area
approaching a burning barrel providing warm orange light on the left side of the path
moving into the warm glow of the fire, creating contrast with the cool neon ambient light

agents.ego_description: walking past the NPCs and continuing through the decayed urban terrain toward the warm light of a fire

entered.detail: metal barrel with active flames providing warm orange illumination and smoke
curved metal track structure of an abandoned amusement park ride silhouetted against the sky
the yellow warning sign becomes visible again in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: Having passed the NPCs, the camera moves through increasingly decayed urban terrain with overgrown vegetation. A burning barrel provides warm orange light that contrasts sharply with the cool neon glow of the city. In the distance, the skeletal remains of a roller coaster track are visible against the foggy sky, and the ATTENTION sign reappears on the left as the camera approaches the fire.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic urban alleyway into a sweeping, neon-drenched dystopian vista that gradually descends into overgrown decay. It begins in a narrow street of ruined buildings before turning left to reveal a breathtaking cityscape of towering skyscrapers and a piercing green laser cutting through the foggy night. As the camera moves onto an elevated concrete walkway, the perspective expands to show a massive yellow attention sign and glowing advertisements overlooking the city below. The scene then shifts toward an overgrown path where vegetation reclaims the concrete, leading the camera past two stationary NPCs who stand as silent figures in the haze. Finally, the view transitions into increasingly decayed terrain where the cool neon glow is interrupted by the warm orange light of a burning barrel, with the skeletal remains of a roller coaster visible against the distant sky.
